name: Khan Academy Kids
description: A comprehensive early learning platform designed for young children to build foundational skills in reading, math and creativity through interactive lessons, stories and engaging activities in a safe environment.

name: Duolingo ABC
description: An interactive literacy app that helps children learn letters, phonics and basic reading skills through gamified lessons, engaging visuals and structured activities tailored for early childhood education.

name: Starfall
description: A phonics and reading focused platform offering interactive activities that help children learn alphabets, pronunciation and early reading skills through songs, animations and simple games.

name: ABCmouse
description: A structured early learning curriculum platform covering reading, math, art and music through progressive lessons, games and rewards designed for preschool and kindergarten learners.

name: PBS Kids
description: Educational platform offering games and videos that teach early math, reading and life skills through fun characters and engaging storytelling designed for young children.

name: Khan Academy
description: A global learning platform providing structured lessons in mathematics, science and more with practice exercises and personalized learning dashboards for school students.

name: BYJU'S
description: An interactive learning application delivering animated lessons and quizzes for school subjects, helping students understand complex concepts through visual explanations.

name: Toppr
description: An online learning platform offering structured courses, practice questions and performance analytics to support school education and exam preparation.

name: Vedantu
description: A live online tutoring platform that provides interactive classes, doubt solving sessions and structured academic guidance for school students.

name: BBC Bitesize
description: A free educational platform offering revision materials, lessons and quizzes across subjects to help students strengthen their academic knowledge.

name: Scratch
description: A block based programming platform developed by MIT that enables children to create games, animations and stories while learning coding concepts.

name: Code.org
description: A structured computer science learning platform offering interactive coding lessons, games and project based activities for beginners.

name: Tynker
description: A gamified coding platform providing step by step lessons in programming, robotics and game development for young learners.

name: Blockly Games
description: An educational platform offering coding puzzles and games that introduce programming logic through interactive visual challenges.

name: MIT App Inventor
description: A visual programming tool that allows students to build mobile applications using block based coding techniques and logical thinking.

name: Canva
description: A design platform that allows students to create posters, presentations and creative projects using easy drag and drop tools.

name: Tinkercad
description: A beginner friendly 3D design and modeling platform that helps students explore creativity and engineering concepts.

name: Chrome Music Lab
description: An interactive platform that helps children experiment with music, rhythm and sound using simple visual tools.

name: Pixlr
description: An online photo editing tool that enables students to create and edit images for creative and academic projects easily.

name: Storyboard That
description: A storytelling platform that allows students to create comics and visual narratives to enhance creativity and communication skills.

name: Prodigy Math
description: A game based learning platform that turns math practice into interactive adventures with rewards and progress tracking.

name: Cool Math Games
description: A platform offering logic based games that help improve problem solving skills while making learning enjoyable.

name: ABCya
description: Educational game platform designed for kids to learn math, reading and logic through fun interactive games.

name: Funbrain
description: An educational platform offering games and books that help children improve math and reading skills through fun activities.

name: SplashLearn
description: A curriculum aligned game based platform focusing on math and reading skills for school students.

name: Epic Books
description: A digital reading platform offering a large collection of books, audiobooks and educational videos for children.

name: Storyline Online
description: A storytelling platform where popular actors read children's books to promote literacy and imagination.

name: Oxford Owl
description: A reading platform providing free ebooks and resources to support children's literacy development.

name: Storyberries
description: A collection of free children's stories, poems and educational content designed to encourage reading habits.

name: International Children's Digital Library
description: A global digital library offering free access to children's books from around the world in multiple languages.

name: YouTube Kids
description: A child friendly video platform offering curated educational and entertainment content with parental controls and safe viewing experience designed specifically for young audiences.

name: National Geographic Kids
description: An engaging platform providing educational videos, facts and interactive content about animals, science and geography for children.

name: Discovery Kids
description: A learning platform featuring educational shows and videos that introduce science, nature and real world concepts to children in an engaging way.

name: Nick Jr

description: A gamified language learning platform that helps students build vocabulary and communication skills through interactive lessons.
